description_long: This object is a dark, disc-shaped form with a smooth, featureless surface and a low profile, resembling a perfectly flat cylinder. The edges are gently rounded, and there are no visible windows, doors, wheels, or any other distinguishing features typically associated with an SUV. The entire exterior is uniformly colored in a deep black, with no visible trim, lights, or reflective surfaces. The object appears solid and opaque, with no transparent or translucent sections. Its proportions are extremely flat, with a diameter much greater than its height, giving it a distinctly non-vehicular appearance. There are no visible markings, logos, or text anywhere on the surface.
description: A flat, black, disc-shaped object with a smooth, featureless surface and no visible vehicle details. Its proportions are extremely low and wide, lacking any recognizable SUV features.
description_view_0: From this view, the object appears as a flat, black disc with a smooth, unbroken surface and no visible features.
description_view_1: This view is nearly identical to the previous, showing the same flat, featureless black disc with no discernible details.
description_view_2: Again, the object presents as a uniformly black, smooth disc, with no visible changes or features from this angle.
description_view_3: The view remains consistent, displaying a flat, black disc with no distinguishing marks or features.
